(born February 20, 1997) is a Turkish professional [basketball](/wiki/Basketball "Basketball") player for [Türk Telekom](/wiki/T%C3%BCrk_Telekom_B.K. "Türk Telekom B.K.") of the [Basketbol Süper Ligi](/wiki/Basketbol_S%C3%BCper_Ligi "Basketbol Süper Ligi") (BSL) and the [EuroCup](/wiki/EuroCup_Basketball "EuroCup Basketball"). Standing at 6 ft 9 in (2.06 m), he plays as [power forward](/wiki/Power_forward_(basketball) "Power forward (basketball)").

**Berkan Durmaz** (born February 20, 1997) is a Turkish professional [basketball](/wiki/Basketball "Basketball") player for [Türk Telekom](/wiki/T%C3%BCrk_Telekom_B.K. "Türk Telekom B.K.") of the [Basketbol Süper Ligi](/wiki/Basketbol_S%C3%BCper_Ligi "Basketbol Süper Ligi") (BSL) and the [EuroCup](/wiki/EuroCup_Basketball "EuroCup Basketball"). Standing at 6 ft 9 in (2.06 m), he plays as [power forward](/wiki/Power_forward_(basketball) "Power forward (basketball)").

## Professional career

[[edit](/w/index.php?title=Berkan_Durmaz&action=edit&section=1 "Edit section: Professional career")]

Born in [Osmangazi](/wiki/Osmangazi "Osmangazi") in [Bursa](/wiki/Bursa "Bursa"), Durmaz cut his teeth in the youth system of [Tofaş S.K.](/wiki/Tofa%C5%9F_S.K. "Tofaş S.K."), before making his debut in professional basketball during the 2015–16 season. He saw action for Tofas in the [TBL](/wiki/Turkish_Basketball_First_League "Turkish Basketball First League") as well as for the club's reserve squad in the [TBL2](/wiki/Turkish_Basketball_Second_League "Turkish Basketball Second League").

On July 2, 2021, he has signed with [Pınar Karşıyaka](/wiki/Kar%C5%9F%C4%B1yaka_Basket "Karşıyaka Basket") of the [Turkish Super League](/wiki/Turkish_Basketball_Super_League "Turkish Basketball Super League") (BSL).[[1]](#cite_note-1)

On July 4, 2023, he signed with [Beşiktaş](/wiki/Be%C5%9Fikta%C5%9F_J.K._(men%27s_basketball) "Beşiktaş J.K. (men's basketball)") of the Turkish [Basketbol Süper Ligi](/wiki/Basketbol_S%C3%BCper_Ligi "Basketbol Süper Ligi") (BSL).[[2]](#cite_note-2)

On June 27, 2024, he signed with [Türk Telekom](/wiki/T%C3%BCrk_Telekom_B.K. "Türk Telekom B.K.") of the Turkish [Basketbol Süper Ligi](/wiki/Basketbol_S%C3%BCper_Ligi "Basketbol Süper Ligi") (BSL).[[3]](#cite_note-3)

## International career

[[edit](/w/index.php?title=Berkan_Durmaz&action=edit&section=2 "Edit section: International career")]

Durmaz represented the [Turkish national basketball team](/wiki/Turkish_national_basketball_team "Turkish national basketball team") at the 2013 under-16 and the 2015 under-18 European Championships.[[4]](#cite_note-4)
